source: https://lescoebillcheck.pk/lesco-tariff-rate/ (LESCO A1 residential & A2 commercial tariff tables)
note: Protected consumers (≤200 units for 6 consecutive months) are billed on a progressive/telescopic slab basis. Non-protected consumers (any month over 200 units) are billed at a single flat rate applied to their ENTIRE month's consumption - this causes a sharp jump right after 200 units. This app has no way to know a user's 6-month history, so it assumes: units ≤200 this month = protected rates, units >200 this month = non-protected rates. NEPRA/DISCOs revise these rates via Fuel Price Adjustment roughly every 1-3 months. K-Electric (Karachi) follows a separately determined tariff that may differ from other DISCOs - figures shown are indicative for K-Electric users.

extraCharges.note: Illustrative default rates based on commonly published NEPRA/DISCO charge structures. Verify against a current real bill for exact amounts.
